_documentation: This file documents the shape of project_configured_images rows. The actual list of images scanned for a project lives in the database table, not in this file. Deptex reads project_configured_images at scan time; this JSON is here for engineers who want to see the canonical shape without pulling down the migration.

examples._note: Public image. credentials_id=null means the scanner pulls anonymously.

examples.credentials_id: <uuid of an organization_registry_credentials row with registry_type='ghcr'>
examples._note: Private image. The cred MUST belong to the same organization as the project.

examples.credentials_id: <uuid of an organization_registry_credentials row with registry_type='ecr'>
examples._note: Disabled rows are kept in the table but skipped by the orchestrator. Re-enabling counts against the per-project enabled cap of 20.
